title: Non-record submission: E03 QK-Gain Scaling (4.0)
author: Bsanath27

data.description: Query-key attention gain scaling was increased from the baseline to improve early convergence.
Model uses 8 attention heads with 4 KV heads.

novel_contributions: Scaled query-key attention gain from 1.5 to 4.0
Reduced training steps from 71 to 30 on local MLX evaluation
Demonstrated a potential early-convergence efficiency lever for the 9L-512D architecture
Produced a 5.15 MB artifact under the submission size limit
